name: Local Commit and Push Readiness Gate
source_gate: Phase 21.0 delivery and queue selection sweep
decision: Select local commit/push as the recommended next branch, but keep it behind an explicit approval gate. The pre-21.1 sweep found no pre-existing dirty delivery payload and no ahead commits, so 21.1 only records the readiness contract and required commit hygiene.

sweep_evidence.live_pi_verification_reason: 21.1 is plan-only and does not authorize Pi deploy, service reload, Caddy reload, or live runtime mutation.

verified_current: Local main is synchronized with origin/main before 21.1 edits.
The repo documents Phase 20 as closed_stabilized and Phase 21 as a delivery and queue selection gate.
Phase 20.2, 20.3, and 20.4 contract and pytest lock files exist locally.

proposed_commit_grouping.intent: Record the authorized 21.1 local commit/push readiness decision and keep commit/push behind explicit approval.
exclude: local database, log, backup, upload, attachment, and runtime artifacts
dependency or vendor churn not directly required by 21.1

stop_conditions: Any DB, log, upload, attachment, backup, .omx, build, or .env artifact appears in the staged set.
Any secret, credential, bearer token, private key, or personal data artifact is found in files proposed for commit.
git status shows unexpected unrelated dirty files.
HEAD and origin/main divergence is not understood before push.
Tests fail or cannot run without a documented validation gap.
The branch requires Pi deploy, Caddy reload, systemd service reload, Go file-read/body scan, Go writes/files/migrations, frontend default change, Python removal, or public exposure expansion.

allowed_next_step.title: Explicit Local Commit and Push Approval Gate
allowed_next_step.scope: After 21.1 validation, the user may explicitly approve staging, committing, and pushing only the 21.1 docs/test readiness payload. The commit must exclude runtime/private artifacts and must use the Lore commit protocol.
not_authorized_without_approval: Pi deploy or live service reload
